message:
✨ Add Cluster dialog (Layer 1) with command-line instructions (#1370)

- AddClusterDialog: modal with 3 tabs (Command Line active, Import/Connect disabled)
- EmptyClusterState: shown when no clusters found with Add Cluster CTA
- Add Cluster button in DashboardHeader via rightExtra prop
- i18n keys for all user-facing strings in cluster section

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:

Create a context', + command: 'kubectl config set-context --cluster= --user=', + }, + { + comment: '# 4.
